issues.description: PlayFromHand action is missing the cost constraint. Effect text specifies 'with a cost equal to or less than the number of DON!! cards on your field' — DSL must include maxCost parameter based on HasRestingDon count, not just play up to 1 card.

PlayFromHand is missing the conditional 'If you do' logic. The second action (FlipLife) should only trigger if a card was successfully played. DSL should use conditional chaining or conditional action structure.
